title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.275 - Myasthenia Gravis Awareness Month designated for month of June
text:
9.275.  Myasthenia Gravis Awareness Month designated for month of June. — The month of June is hereby designated as "Myasthenia Gravis Awareness Month" in Missouri.  The citizens of this state are encouraged to celebrate the month with events and activities to raise awareness about this treatable, but progressive and difficult to diagnose, disease.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738)
